double_strike.name: Double Strike
double_strike.desc: Two hits at 40 power each. Each rolls crit separately.

pyre.name: Pyre
pyre.desc: Fire damage. Applies burn (5% HP/turn, 4 turns).

inferno.name: Inferno
inferno.desc: Charges 1 turn, then huge fire damage.

self_immolate.name: Self-Immolate
self_immolate.desc: Big fire damage. Costs 25% max HP.

cinder_burst.name: Cinder Burst
cinder_burst.desc: Two fire hits at 35 power each. Both can apply burn.

smoldering.name: Smoldering Touch
smoldering.desc: Fire damage. Each consecutive use extends the burn duration on target by +2 turns.

phoenix_dive.name: Phoenix Dive
phoenix_dive.desc: Fire damage. Heal self 50% of damage dealt.

pyroclasm.name: Pyroclasm
pyroclasm.desc: Burn enemy AND your own bench creature. No damage.

surge.name: Surge
surge.desc: Water damage. Applies 1 stack of soaking.

maelstrom.name: Maelstrom
maelstrom.desc: Charges 1 turn. Big water damage + soaking.

lifestream.name: Lifestream
lifestream.desc: Water damage. Heal self for damage dealt.

brine_lance.name: Brine Lance
brine_lance.desc: Fast water spear. Always strikes first. Soaks target.

tidal_pull.name: Tidal Pull
tidal_pull.desc: Charges 1 turn. Forces opponent to swap.

vapor_cloak.name: Vapor Cloak
vapor_cloak.desc: +30% DEF this battle. Soaks attackers when hit.

glacial_hold.name: Glacial Hold
glacial_hold.desc: Light water damage. Applies 2 stacks of soaking.

bramble.name: Bramble
bramble.desc: Grass damage. Bloom on self (heal 5%/turn, 4 turns).

overgrowth.name: Overgrowth
overgrowth.desc: Charges 1 turn. Big grass damage + long bloom self.

spore_cloud.name: Spore Cloud
spore_cloud.desc: Bloom on you AND your bench creature.

photonic_lash.name: Photonic Lash
photonic_lash.desc: Grass damage. Adds bloom on self.

strangle_vine.name: Strangle Vine
strangle_vine.desc: Grass damage. Power scales with target missing HP (up to 1.5x).

radiance.name: Radiance
radiance.desc: Light damage. Cleanse all statuses on self.

solar_flare.name: Solar Flare
solar_flare.desc: Charges 1 turn. Big light damage + dazed.

dawn_strike.name: Dawn Strike
dawn_strike.desc: Quick light strike. Always first. Applies dazed.

aegis_swap.name: Aegis Swap
aegis_swap.desc: Swap to bench. Incoming creature gets +30% DEF.

cleansing_light.name: Cleansing Light
cleansing_light.desc: No damage. Cleanses ALL statuses on self.

hex.name: Hex
hex.desc: Charges 1 turn. No damage. Curses opponent.

soulrend.name: Soulrend
soulrend.desc: Big dark damage. Costs 20% max HP.

shadow_step.name: Shadow Step
shadow_step.desc: Dark damage, then swap to bench.

cursed_bond.name: Cursed Bond
cursed_bond.desc: Curse enemy AND your own bench creature. No damage.

eclipse_slash.name: Eclipse Slash
eclipse_slash.desc: Dark damage. +50% if target is already cursed. Applies cursed.

mend.name: Mend
mend.desc: Bloom on self: heal 6% max HP / turn for 4 turns.

tactical_retreat.name: Tactical Retreat
tactical_retreat.desc: Swap to bench. Incoming creature heals 30% max HP.

pivot_strike.name: Pivot Strike
pivot_strike.desc: Light hit. Then swap to bench.

vanguard_call.name: Vanguard Call
vanguard_call.desc: Swap to bench. Incoming creature gets +50% ATK.
